content: Questa zona della biblioteca è chiusa al pubblico.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:This area of the library is closed to the public
eng:This part of the library is closed to the public
eng:This portion of the library is off-limits to the public
eng:This section of the library is closed to the public
